# 孙亮亮

发布时间：2023-02-15   点击量： 9327

![](https://kzgc.neuq.edu.cn/__local/A/35/7C/9E0F778E84DC4608ED25E5F94C4_1E9FD942_68F6.jpg)

孙亮亮, 男, 1981年09月01日, 中共党员, 博士, 教授, 博士生导师, 控制工程学院副院长。

Liangliang Sun, currently serving as Professor and Asscociate Dean at the School of Control Engineering, Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao, China, brings a wealth of expertise to his roles. He previously held the position of Senior Visiting Scholar at the University of Connecticut. Sun's distinguished achievements include being recognized as a key figure in the "Xingliao Talent Plan" and attaining the Thousand-Person Level in the "Hundred and Ten Thousand Talents Project" in Liaoning, China.

Prof. Sun actively contributes to various professional bodies, serving as a member of the IFAC TC 8.3 Professional Committee and as a Young Associate Editor for Complex System Modeling and Simulation. Additionally, he is affiliated with the IEEE RAS and contributes his expertise to the Communication Evaluation Committee of the National Natural Science Foundation of China. Sun also serves as an Evaluation Expert for the China Academic Degree and Graduate Education Development Center.

**联系方式**

电子邮箱：sunliangliang@neuq.edu.cn

联系电话：13998111611

通信地址：河北省秦皇岛市海港区东北大学南校区科技楼5003

**Contact Information**

E-mail: sunliangliang@neuq.edu.cn

Phone: +86-13998111611

Address: 5003 Keji Building, 143 Taishan Road, Qinhuangdao Economic and Technological Development Zone, Qinhuangdao, Hebei, China

**研究方向**

1\. 管理决策优化: 复杂流程工业生产过程决策优化理论算法

2\. 智能生产制造: 生产过程参量的实时获取与智能感知技术

3\. 智能交通系统: 自主式交通系统一体化信息模型构建策略

**Research Interests**

1\. Management Decision Optimization: Decision Optimization Theory and Algorithm for Complex Process Industrial Production Processes

2\. Intelligent Production Manufacturing: Real Time Acquisition and Intelligent Perception Technology for Production Process Parameters

3\. Intelligent Transportation System: Strategy for Constructing an Integrated Information model for Autonomous Transportation Systems

**教育背景**

2009.08-2011.08 美国康涅狄格大学博士学位 (国家留学基金委联合培养)

2005.09-2015.02 东北大学博士学位 (硕博连读)

1999.09-2003.08 北京交通大学学士学位

**Education**

Ph. D., Electrical Engineering, University of Connecticut 2009 (Supported by CSC), 2009.08-2011.08

M.S. & Ph.D., Control Theory and Control Engineering, Northeastern University, 2005.09-2015.02

B.S., Information and Communication Engineering, Beijing Jiaotong University, 1999.09-2003.08

**工作履历**

2022.12-至今东北大学秦皇岛分校控制工程学院教授/副院长

2020.11-2022.11 沈阳建筑大学电气与控制工程学院教授/副院长

2016.08-2017.08 美国康涅狄格大学电子工程学院博士后

2015.02-2020.10 沈阳建筑大学信息与控制工程学院副教授/副院长

**主要奖励荣誉**

1\. 2022年辽宁省教学成果一等奖

2\. 2020年辽宁省百千万人才工程千人层次

3\. 2019年辽宁省兴辽英才计划青年拔尖人才

**主要竞赛获奖**

1\. 2023年全国第十八届挑战杯课外学术科技作品竞赛揭榜挂帅专项赛一等奖

2\. 2007年全国第十届挑战杯课外学术科技作品竞赛一等奖

3\. 2008年全国第六届挑战杯大学生创业计划竞赛银奖

**主要学术兼职**

1\. 国际自动控制联合会环境系统模型与控制专业委员会（IFAC-TC 8.3）委员

2\. 国际期刊《Complex System Modeling and Simulation》青年编委

3\. 国际期刊《International Journal of Applied Mathematics in Control Engineering》副主编

**主要科研情况**

1\. 国家工业和信息化部工业互联网创新发展工程项目: 基于工业互联网平台的新型潜在失效模式及后果分析系统 (TC210804F)

2\. 国家自然科学基金面上项目: 不确定环境下炼钢-连铸批量计划与生产调度一体化优化方法的研究 (61873174)

3\. 国家自然科学基金青年项目: 基于高效拉氏松弛迭代算法的炼钢-连铸主辅设备调度方法的研究 (61503259)

**代表性学术成果**

【论文】

1\. Liang-liang Sun; Miao Yu; Feng-hao Wang, Capacity Decisions and Revenue sharing in a Telemedicine Healthcare System, Journal of Combinatorial Optimization, 2023, 46(31)

2\. Liang-liang Sun; An Efficient and Effective Approach for the Scheduling of Steelmaking-continuous Casting Process with Multi Different Refining Routes, IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2022, 7(4)

3\. Liang-liang Sun; Hang Jin; Ye Li; Research on Scheduling of Iron and Steel Scrap Steelmaking and Continuous Casting Process Aiming at Power Saving and Carbon Emissions Reducing, IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2018, 3(3)

【专利】

1\. Liang-liang Sun; A Management Method Based on the Optimization of Steelmaking Continuous Casting Production Management, 2023-09-01, Luxembourg, LU503321

2.孙亮亮; 李聪鑫; 一种高效求解炼钢-连铸炉次批量计划的优化方法, 2022-03-11, 中国, ZL 201810882336.3

3\. 孙亮亮; 屈秋霞; 毛永明; 张东伟; 于淼; 项英辉; 黄奕仁; 一种基于炼钢连铸生产优化调度装置, 2021-10-19, 中国, ZL 202010907603.5

**主要讲授课程情况**

1\. 研究生课程: 非线性规划、数学建模

2\. 本科生课程: 自动化类专业导论、电路原理

3\. 留学生课程: Electrical Circuit

**指导研究生情况**

**指导毕业硕士研究生** **18** **名** **(** **含国际留学生** **1** **名** **);** **在读博士研究生** **4** **名** **,** **硕士研究生** **10** **名** **. 5** **人获得国家优秀奖学金** **.** **多名学生赴美、加、澳等国攻读硕士和博士学位** **.** **计划** **每年招收博士研究生** **1-2** **人** **,** **硕士研究生** **5** **人** **.**
